title: Creamy Mexican Vegetable Curry
description: A rich and flavorful curry made with roasted vegetables and a blend of creamy spices. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: velvety
ingredients.notes: Cashew cream or substitute with your preferred creamer

ingredients.name: vegetable
ingredients.notes: Mixed bell peppers, carrots, and zucchini

instructions: Toss the mixed vegetables in a bowl with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread them on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
In a large saucepan, heat the remaining olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the ground cumin, coriander powder, and red chili powder. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the roasted vegetables, vegetable broth, cashew cream, and dried oregano. Stir well.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10-12 minutes or until the sauce thickens.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the curry hot with your preferred sides.
